dysentery.label: Dysentery
dysentery.description: Severe diarrhea and dehydration. Can lead to death if untreated.

injured.label: Injured
injured.description: Minor injury sustained. Slows down the group.

exhausted.label: Exhausted
exhausted.description: Too much travel, not enough rest.

exposure.label: Exposure
exposure.description: Cold, wet, or windy conditions caused a chill.

well_rested.label: Well Rested
well_rested.description: Everyone got a full night's sleep. Spirits are high.

bonding.label: Bonding
bonding.description: The group is getting along well, laughing and telling stories.

found_spring.label: Found a Spring
found_spring.description: Discovered a clean freshwater spring. Spirits and health improve.

windy_day.label: Windy Day
windy_day.description: A gusty but uneventful day on the trail.

saw_buffalo.label: Saw a Buffalo Herd
saw_buffalo.description: A herd passed in the distance. A memorable sight, but no impact.
